description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a distinctive curved magazine, reminiscent of the AK-47 design. The body is primarily matte black metal, with wooden accents on the stock, handguard, and pistol grip, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The rifle features a fixed wooden stock and a standard-length barrel with a simple front post sight and rear notch sight. The magazine is a detachable, curved box type, likely designed for intermediate cartridges. The trigger guard, charging handle, and safety lever are all visible, indicating standard manual operation. The overall construction suggests durability and reliability, suitable for urban environments.
description: A black and wood-accented assault rifle with a curved magazine, fixed stock, and standard iron sights, resembling an AK-47.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel opening and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine curve, wooden grip, and the receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear-on view focusing on the stock and the back of the receiver.
